title: US Embassy visits the center
description: We are honored to welcome a visiting delegation from the 𝐔𝐒 𝐄𝐦𝐛𝐚𝐬𝐬𝐲 - 𝐅𝐮𝐥𝐛𝐫𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭 𝐏𝐡𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐩𝐩𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐬. Led by 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐟. 𝐀𝐥𝐛𝐞𝐫𝐭𝐬𝐨𝐧 𝐃. 𝐀𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐞, VP for Research Development and Extension Services and Director of STEER Hub.This visit highlights our commitment to fostering international collaborations that drive research, development, and academic excellence. We are excited to showcase the innovative work being done here and explore new frontiers in global exchange.
alt: Visit highlights our commitment to fostering international collaborations that drive research, development, and academic excellence.

title: Technical support to the innovation team from 𝐈𝐧𝐝𝐢𝐚𝐧 𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐞 𝐔𝐧𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐢𝐭𝐲
description: 𝐈𝐧𝐧𝐨𝐯𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐢𝐧 𝐅𝐮𝐥𝐥 𝐒𝐰𝐢𝐧𝐠! The center is buzzing with activity as we provide critical technical support to the innovation team from 𝐈𝐧𝐝𝐢𝐚𝐧 𝐌𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐞 𝐔𝐧𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐢𝐭𝐲. The team was officially welcomed by 𝐃𝐫. 𝐑𝐚𝐥𝐩𝐡 𝐆𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐫𝐝 𝐁. 𝐒𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐚𝐥𝐚𝐧𝐠 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐄𝐧𝐠𝐫. 𝐂𝐚𝐫𝐥𝐨𝐬 𝐉𝐡𝐚𝐲 𝐀. 𝐀𝐫𝐫𝐨𝐲𝐨, and now the real work begins! Our talented electronics technician interns are currently taking the lead on the technical execution, applying their skills to ensure the success of this innovation project.Proud to be a hub where expert mentorship meets hands-on technical excellence.
alt: Expert mentorship meets hands-on technical excellence.

title: 𝐁𝐫𝐢𝐝𝐠𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐄𝐱𝐜𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐚𝐜𝐫𝐨𝐬𝐬 𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐭𝐮𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬
description: We were honored to host our visitors from the 𝙍𝙞𝙯𝙖𝙡 𝙏𝙚𝙘𝙝𝙣𝙤𝙡𝙤𝙜𝙞𝙘𝙖𝙡 𝙐𝙣𝙞𝙫𝙚𝙧𝙨𝙞𝙩𝙮 (𝙍𝙏𝙐) today. It was an inspiring session centered on innovation and shared academic goals.The RTU delegation was warmly welcomed by 𝐄𝐧𝐠𝐫. 𝐂𝐚𝐫𝐥𝐨𝐬 𝐉𝐡𝐚𝐲 𝐀. 𝐀𝐫𝐫𝐨𝐲𝐨, along with 𝐄𝐧𝐠𝐫. 𝐕𝐢𝐧𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐕𝐞𝐫𝐠𝐚𝐫𝐚. We look forward to the potential partnerships and breakthroughs this visit.
alt: May spark as we continue to build bridges across institutions!
